digest.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
digest.tldr: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.

digest.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
digest.tldr: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

digest.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
digest.tldr: 6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.

digest.title: Aurora 1.5: Extending open foundation models for weather and Earth-system applications
digest.tldr: 5 adds 22 more variables, hourly temporal resolution, and probabilistic ensemble forecasting to the Aurora foundation model, making it more useful for real-world weather, climate, and energy applications.  5: Extending…

digest.title: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
digest.tldr: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it.
